name: mcp-server-document
summary: MCP server for academic document authoring: grant proposals (科研費/JSPS), journal papers (IEEE/IEEJ/APS/Elsevier), research-talk slides + Excalidraw diagram pipeline + cross-cutting meta helpers. 94 diagnostic tools distilled from classical writing books (木下/本多/Wallwork). 0.7.0: diagram preprocess (deskew/CLAHE/Sauvola), Hough shape detect, MSER+DBSCAN text grouping, Bezier fit, semantic group, stroke-width normalise, SVG/TikZ export.
